overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a snowy medieval fantasy village at dusk. The character walks through cobblestone streets, ascends stone stairs, passes through an archway tunnel, and enters an open village square with a large decorated tree. The scene features timber-framed buildings, warm lantern light against a purple winter sky, and light snowfall.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snow-covered medieval village street lined with timber-framed buildings and festive string lights. Warm light from braziers contrasts with the cool purple dusk sky. The character approaches and begins ascending a steep stone staircase.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs between closely packed medieval buildings. Other villagers are seen walking in the opposite direction. The stone archway entrance becomes visible ahead as the character continues climbing toward the tunnel.

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway tunnel, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed passage illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns. The tunnel opens up ahead to reveal the exit back into the village square.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with large decorated tree and market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the archway into a wide village square dominated by a large decorated tree with string lights. Several NPCs are gathered near the tree, and market stalls are visible to the left. The open sky shows the purple hues of dusk as snow continues to fall gently.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy medieval village that transitions from narrow, festive streets into a wide, open square. It begins with the character walking past timber-framed buildings and warm braziers under a purple dusk sky before ascending a steep stone staircase. As the character climbs between closely packed houses and passes other villagers, the path leads directly toward a looming stone archway. The scene then shifts into the enclosed passage of the tunnel, where wall-mounted lanterns provide the primary light until the exit opens ahead. Finally, the camera emerges from the archway into a spacious village square, revealing market stalls and a large decorated tree glowing with string lights amidst the gentle snowfall.
